zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne Comyn於大約1293年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾巴登時，她的父親John Comyn II52歲，母親Alianora de Balliol48歲。她於1308年與David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1326年7月24日在她的家鄉享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne Comyn于大约1293年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾巴登时，她的父亲John Comyn II52岁，母亲Alianora de Balliol48岁。她于1308年与David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1326年7月24日在她的家乡享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne Comyn was born about 1293, in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, her father, John Comyn II, was 52 and her mother, Alianora de Balliol, was 48. She married David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl in 1308, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 24 July 1326, in her hometown, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne Comyn est née environ 1293, à Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, John Comyn II, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Alianora de Balliol, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl en 1308, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 24 juillet 1326, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne Comyn um 1293 in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Comyn II 52 und ihre Mutter Alianora de Balliol 48. Sie hat 1308 in Scotland David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 24. Juli 1326 im Alter von 34 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne Comyn è nata il circa 1293 nel Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, sua padre, John Comyn II, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Alianora de Balliol, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl nel 1308, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 24 luglio 1326, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne Comynが約1293年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアバデノチで生まれた時，父John Comyn IIは52歳，母Alianora de Balliolは48歳であった。1308年にスコットランドでDavid II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Athollと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1326年7月24日に故郷で34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne Comyn(이)가 대략 1293년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 바데노치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Comyn II(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alianora de Balliol(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 1308년 스컷랜드에서 David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 7월 24일 그녀의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland: Srath Bhalgaidh, Coontie o Aiberdeen, Шотланд

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne Comyn nasceu aproximadamente 1293, em Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, John Comyn II, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Alianora de Balliol, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl em 1308, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 24 de julho de 1326, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne Comyn родилась около 1293 г. в местности баденох, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Comyn II было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Alianora de Balliol, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl в 1308 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 24 июля 1326 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne Comyn nació aproximadamente 1293, en Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, John Comyn II, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Alianora de Balliol, tenía 48 años. Se casó con David II de Strathbogie 10th Earl of Atholl en 1308, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 24 de julio de 1326, en su pueblo, a la edad de 34 años.
